accommodations.text: Allow access to a designated quiet space when overwhelmed.
accommodations.source_quote: Allow access to a designated quiet space when overwhelmed.

accommodations.text: State task expectations explicitly and in writing.
accommodations.source_quote: State task expectations explicitly and in writing.

accommodations.text: Break multi-step directions into chunked, numbered steps.
accommodations.source_quote: Break multi-step directions into chunked, numbered steps.

accommodations.text: Pair auditory alerts and directions with a visual cue.
accommodations.source_quote: Pair auditory alerts and directions with a visual cue.

accommodations.text: Allow additional wait time for verbal responses.
accommodations.source_quote: Allow additional wait time for verbal responses.

services.source_quote: Specialized academic instruction: 100 minutes per week; 50 minutes, 2 times weekly; provider: Special education teacher.
Specialized academic instruction: 150 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 5 times weekly; provider: Special education teacher.

goals.text: Noah will sustain attention to an independent task for 10 minutes in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Sustains attention for 3 minutes in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Noah will sustain attention to an independent task for 10 minutes in 4 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Grace will produce three organized sentences on a topic in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Produces one sentence on a topic in 2 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: Grace will produce three organized sentences on a topic in 4 of 5 samples.

goals.text: Marcus will independently begin a classroom task within two minutes of the direction in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Begins a task within two minutes in 1 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Marcus will independently begin a classroom task within two minutes of the direction in 4 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Layla will independently report FM system problems to the teacher in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Reports FM system problems with prompting in 1 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Layla will independently report FM system problems to the teacher in 4 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Diego will write a paragraph with a clear topic sentence and three details in 4 of 5 samples.
